primary.title: Nothing is waiting on you right now
primary.description: New review requests, assignments, and due items will appear here first.

other.title: No updates need later attention
other.description: Risks, blockers, and follow signals gather here when they need a second pass.

digest.title: No doc digest is ready yet
digest.description: When the same project, issue, or workflow collects enough doc changes, this view merges them into one digest.

later.title: No items are snoozed right now
later.description: If a signal is read but should not interrupt your flow, you can move it here for later.

cleared.title: Nothing has been cleared yet
cleared.description: Signals you clear leave the active queue and stay here as a short record.

filters.archivedHint: This view is already grouped by status, so extra filters are not available.

hint: Click any row to open the related issue, project, workflow, or doc. You can also mark it read, snooze it, accept a handoff, or clear the signal directly.

states.errorDescription: Please try again in a moment.

toasts.openFailed: Could not open this inbox item.
toasts.updateReadFailed: Could not update the read state.
toasts.clearAllFailed: Could not clear the current view.
